title: TierHashes
description: SHA-256 tier hashes for a bond's static fields. Each hash covers a different field subset; see SCHEMA.md §6.

calc_hash_min.description: Hash over isin, coupon, maturity_date, frequency, day_count.

calc_hash_std.description: Hash over the min set + issue_date, first_coupon_date.

calc_hash_full.description: Hash over the std set + calendar, business_day_convention.
